utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each of them is fully detailed with cost information and descriptions of what is covered. Health coverage includes both physical and mental health with costs; property coverage includes home/contents and high-value items with costs; travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional services lists enhancements with costs; and total budget provides monthly and annual breakdowns and savings. Therefore, all 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes several named policies and service add-ons. Each must be matched with the corresponding item and rating from the ground-truth dataset. Step-by-step: (1) The physical health plan is 'PrimeCare Premium Physical Health' which corresponds to 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, rated 10. (2) The mental health plan is 'PrimeCare Premium Mental Health' which corresponds to 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health, rated 10. (3) The property coverage includes 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection.home_content with rating 10. (4) 'High-Value Items Extension' is not explicitly in the dataset, but it is an extension of property protection; since it is tied to closing a coverage gap, it likely relates to the same premium property plan, which retains a 10 rating as part of the EliteHome Premium set. (5) The travel coverage is 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, rated 10. (6) The additional services include 'Premium Medical Network Addon', matching 'Premium Medical Network' under travel_enhancement_services, rated 10. (7) 'Travel Assistance with daily rate coverage' matches '24/7 Travel Assistance' under travel_enhancement_services, rated 10. (8) 'Concierge Services' corresponds to 'Concierge Services' under travel_enhancement_services, rated 8. Therefore, these are the mapped ratings.
